change_config.name: Change configuration
change_config.description: Change configuration for the Oasira AI Conversation integration

reload_skills.name: Reload skills
reload_skills.description: Reload all skills from the user skills directory

download_skill.name: Download skill
download_skill.description: Download a skill from the GitHub repository

skill_name.description: Name of the skill to download

analyze_image.name: Analyze image
analyze_image.description: Analyze an image and provide detailed description

image_path.description: Local file path to the image to analyze

prompt.description: Optional prompt to guide the analysis
prompt.example: Please describe this image in detail.

scan_home_automation_patterns.name: Scan home automation patterns
scan_home_automation_patterns.description: Trigger an automated scan of Home Assistant history data to analyze usage patterns and generate automation recommendations

time_range_days.description: Number of days to analyze (1-90). Higher values provide more data but may take longer to process.

entity_types.description: Types of entities to analyze. Leave empty to analyze all exposed entity types.

include_entities.description: Specific entity IDs to include in analysis. Leave empty to include all entities of the selected types.

exclude_entities.description: Specific entity IDs to exclude from analysis. Useful for excluding entities that don't follow regular patterns.

pattern_types.description: Types of patterns to detect. Leave empty to detect all pattern types.

min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold for pattern detection (0.0-1.0). Higher values show only the most reliable patterns.

time_window_minutes.description: Time window in minutes for grouping similar events. Smaller values detect more precise patterns, larger values are more forgiving of timing variations.

save_results.description: Whether to save the analysis results to a file for later review or sharing.

results_file.description: File path to save results (relative to config directory). Useful for scheduled scans and tracking pattern changes over time.
